---
title: "Brissa Acevedo"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: images/hs2.png
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/camino2phd
    - icon: linkedin 
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/brissa-acevedo
    - icon: linktree
      text: LinkTree
      href: https://linktr.ee/Camino2PhD
    - icon: substack
      text: Substack
      href: https://tr.ee/Ps9I_0sf-m
---

*PhD Candidate in Engineering and Public Policy*

CMU-Portugal | Dual degree Ph.D. program

📍Carnegie Mellon University 🇺🇸 & Faculdade de Engenharia da Universidade do Porto 🇵🇹

## Education

MS, Engineering and Public Policy,  Carnegie Mellon University | 2024

BS, Chemical Engineering, Texas A&M University-Kingsville | 2023
